system.descriptor: Parry is the ability to deflect melee attacks using a weapon or shield.
system.uses:
Uses: Deflecting melee attacks.
Parry is a Reaction and can be used once per Round without penalty. Additional Parry attempts in the same Round suffer a cumulative -20 penalty. A successful Parry negates one hit; extra Degrees of Success negate additional hits from the same attack. A character must be wielding a melee weapon or shield to Parry. Parry cannot be used against ranged attacks unless the character has a special ability that permits it.

description.value: Parry is the ability to deflect melee attacks using a weapon or shield.
